svg.title: Evaluation architecture — order-triage AgentCore
svg.desc: The evaluation plane of the order-triage AgentCore system, shown left-to-right as two lanes that grade the same order_triage Strands agent over a shared gen_ai trace substrate. OFFLINE (left): a developer/CI pytest gate runs the real agent over cases.yaml, applies deterministic tool/substring checks then an Anthropic LLM-as-judge, and a green gate publishes the agent image to ECR which deploys to the runtime. SHARED (centre): the AgentCore Runtime emits gen_ai spans (aws/spans + -DEFAULT content). ONLINE (right): AgentCore Online Evaluations sample those traces at 100%, run 5 built-in evaluators whose InvokeModel judge currently fails with AgentSpanMappingException (0 scores), with result records and the Operations dashboard eval panel as sinks.
svg.text: Two surfaces grade one agent: OFFLINE pytest gate (deterministic + Anthropic judge) blocks the image · ONLINE AgentCore Evaluations sample the shared gen_ai trace substrate (scoring BLOCKED on AgentSpanMappingException)
OFFLINE — CI eval gate (agent/evals) · GATES deploy
ONLINE — AgentCore Online Evaluations · CONTINUOUS · default-off
